description: Qwen3.5 gated delta rule preprocessing: beta = sigmoid(b), g = -exp(A_log) * softplus(a + dt_bias).
name: qwen3_5_gdr_preprocess
reference:
# Source: https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/blob/aad13b87ed59f2afcfaebc985f403301887a35fc/src/transformers/models/qwen3_5/modeling_qwen3_5.py#L585-L587
import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F

def run(A_log, a, b, dt_bias):
    beta = b.sigmoid()
    g = -A_log.float().exp() * F.softplus(a.float() + dt_bias)
    return beta, g
